resources.string: Camera and Microphone permissions are required
Media permission is required to access system gallery
Capture photos in RAW format (DNG) for higher quality. Turn off to use YUV format.
Show horizontal level indicator while shooting
Show focus peaking highlights during manual focus
Capture multiple frames on the YUV path and merge them mainly for noise reduction.
Build one image across multiple shutter presses with ghost preview guidance.
Compose with the ghosted result, then fire again.
How many exposures to combine for one final image. Default is 2 for a classic double exposure workflow.
Number of frames used for YUV multi-frame denoise (more frames reduce noise more, but take longer).
Set the multi-frame super resolution scale. Default is 1x.
Choose the engine for RAW data processing
Capture a short video clip along with your photo for a dynamic live photo effect.
Show the film-like developing animation after capture.
Use GPU (Vulkan) to speed up multi-frame stacking. Default is on.
Add decorative frame and watermark to photos
Choose the baseline LUT and recipe applied before the regular JPG creative LUT.
Choose the baseline LUT and recipe used for RAW rendering, export, and reprocessing.
Choose the baseline LUT and recipe used before Phantom mode creative LUT processing.
Select a baseline LUT for this target. It will be applied before the regular creative LUT.
Play sound when taking a photo
Choose what volume keys do during capture
Mirror front camera photos to match preview
Save location info (GPS) in photo metadata
Adjust the hardware noise reduction mode. "Off" helps preserve details when using software processing.
Adjust the hardware edge enhancement (sharpening) mode.
Enhance image sharpness and edge definition
Reduce image noise while preserving detail
Fine-tune sharpening and noise reduction parameters
Select the JPEG compression quality for photos (higher = better quality, larger file size)
One-time payment for lifetime access to all premium LUT filters and future pro features.
Unlock all premium LUTs and support us.
Import custom LUT filters (.cube) or frame templates (.png/.webp)
Adjustments apply to this photo only
View and export app logs for diagnostics
Set a custom API destination to support compatible language models
Use the built-in AI extraction service without configuring your own API Key.
Backup your preferences and custom imported LUTs/Frames.
Restore from a previous backup ZIP file. App may require a restart to apply.
Restore completed successfully. Please restart the app.
Applying LUT from shared images requires file management access. Please grant access for this app first.
Are you sure you want to delete category \"%s\"? LUTs under this category will be reset to uncategorized.
Used for color conversion when applying this video LUT to photos.

Supported formats: PNG, WebP

Requirements:
• The image must have a transparent area (alpha channel)
• Your photo will be placed behind the frame, visible through the transparent region

Tip: Design your frame with a transparent cutout where you want the photo to appear.
Please enter a frame name and required image source.
Image frames use a transparent PNG or WebP. The selected asset will be copied into app storage.
IMAGE mode only uses the selected frame image. Switch to another position to edit text, logo, divider, or spacer elements.
Select an element from the list to edit it.
Line = -1 means a global element that advances every visible row together.
Vertical dividers appear only when there is at least one visible non-divider element on both sides in the same row.
IMAGE mode ignores text, logo, divider, and spacer elements and only uses the selected frame image asset.
Default uses the system font chosen by the renderer.
DS-DIGIB.TTF is suited for digital timestamp styles.
SlacksideOne.ttf is suited for handwritten branding styles.
Adjust if photos from this camera are rotated incorrectly. Changes apply to this specific camera only.
Support the development of Photon Camera
You are already on the latest version
Update failed. Please try again later.
The update APK has been downloaded. Install it now?
Allow this app to install unknown apps, then tap Install again.
Set the focal length to automatically switch to when the app starts.
Add camera IDs manually, separated by commas. Available IDs will appear in the lens list with a special marker.
Choose the LUT used for RAW color restoration. Use \"None\" for log output.
Choose a unified RAW rendering profile that sets the color space, log curve, and restore LUT together.
Optimizes shadow detail and highlight compression by utilizing Log curve headroom. Higher values preserve more highlights but may require more light.
Based on multi-frame stacking and histogram analysis, automatically reduce exposure to protect highlights when lighting is sufficient. Effective only when RAW and Multi-Frame are enabled.
Choose the target color space for RAW processing.
Choose the transfer function for RAW processing (Log Curve).
Automatically meters RAW linear data during development and applies exposure compensation.
Lower values are closer to evaluative metering; higher values tighten and emphasize the center area.
When exporting a RAW photo, also export its original DNG file to the system gallery.
Estimate white balance from RAW pixels when developing DNG files, useful when device metadata is unreliable.
Manually set the black level for RAW development to fix color cast issues. Applied per camera lens.
Enable 10-bit YUV output for better image data precision. Effective on supported devices when RAW is disabled.
Enable HLG10 dynamic range capture on supported devices. Requires P010 and RAW to be off.
HLG input is decoded manually during Log video and Log LUT processing. When off, the app assumes the system has already decoded HLG and applies no extra handling.
Enable Display P3 output on supported devices. Default is off.
Generate HDR by default for standard JPG
Generate and enable estimated HDR by default in the detail page for standard JPG captures and imports.
When enabled, the app will automatically apply the current LUT to photos taken by the system camera (DCIM/Camera directory) in the background.
• Overlay Permission: Allows the app to run stably in the background to ensure continuous monitoring.
Ready to start screen capture preview.
Screen capture is active and shown in picture-in-picture.
The app is keeping a screen capture preview active.
• All Files Access: Allows the app to read and write system camera photos for a seamless auto-editing experience.
Hide the floating button in Phantom Mode. You can still control it via Quick Settings or App Shortcuts.
Automatically launch the system camera when enabling Phantom Mode via Quick Settings or App Shortcut.
When Phantom Mode is enabled, also start the screen capture PiP live preview.
Choose which part of the recorded screen should be shown in PiP.
When enabled, the app will save the edited photo as a new image instead of overwriting the original one.
Drag to shape color and tone
Set the color scheme for the home screen widget
Select images to analyze style and generate a custom LUT.
LUT Creator requires Premium unless you have configured your own OpenAI API key in Settings.
AI will generate a text LUT recipe from the selected styled image.
e.g., make it moodier, enhance reds
Upload one styled image. AI will infer a text LUT recipe directly, without using image editing.
Upload multiple image pairs. Each pair should include an original image and a styled image of the same scene.
For local analysis, add multiple original/styled pairs. The closer the framing and exposure match, the better the merged control points will be.
Choose the unstyled original first. After that, the next step will clearly ask for the matching styled image.
This step is for the styled image. Pick the version that matches the original scene as closely as possible.
1 pair is still waiting for its styled image
You can add more pairs or start analysis now
AI photo analysis is a Pro feature. Upgrade to unlock AI scoring and comments.
Analysis failed. Check AI settings and try again.
Automatically enable virtual aperture with the selected f-stop value for new photos.
Use neural network to reconstruct image details
